'''鈭歴h-d-ng-sh''' ('''kashadngeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beatmatch|beatmatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beatmatch|beatmatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-d-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kashadngeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadngeshoko|thishadngeshoko]] || [[word:jishadngeshoko|jishadngeshoko]] || [[word:shishadngeshoko|shishadngeshoko]] || [[word:kishadngeshoko|kishadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadngeshoko|thuthushadngeshoko]] || [[word:jujushadngeshoko|jujushadngeshoko]] || [[word:shushushadngeshoko|shushushadngeshoko]] || [[word:kukushadngeshoko|kukushadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushadngeshoko|thushadngeshoko]] || [[word:jushadngeshoko|jushadngeshoko]] || [[word:shushadngeshoko|shushadngeshoko]] || [[word:kushadngeshoko|kushadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushadngeshoko|thushadngeshoko]] || [[word:jushadngeshoko|jushadngeshoko]] || [[word:shushadngeshoko|shushadngeshoko]] || [[word:kushadngeshoko|kushadngeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshadngeshoko|thoshadngeshoko]] || [[word:joshadngeshoko|joshadngeshoko]] || [[word:shoshadngeshoko|shoshadngeshoko]] || [[word:koshadngeshoko|koshadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadngeshoko|thoshadngeshoko]] || [[word:joshadngeshoko|joshadngeshoko]] || [[word:shoshadngeshoko|shoshadngeshoko]] || [[word:koshadngeshoko|koshadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shadngeshoko|th忙shadngeshoko]] || [[word:j忙shadngeshoko|j忙shadngeshoko]] || [[word:sh忙shadngeshoko|sh忙shadngeshoko]] || [[word:k忙shadngeshoko|k忙shadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashadngeshoko|thathashadngeshoko]] || [[word:jajashadngeshoko|jajashadngeshoko]] || [[word:shashashadngeshoko|shashashadngeshoko]] || [[word:kakashadngeshoko|kakashadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashadngeshoko|thashadngeshoko]] || [[word:jashadngeshoko|jashadngeshoko]] || [[word:shashadngeshoko|shashadngeshoko]] || [[word:kashadngeshoko|kashadngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashadngeshoko|thashadngeshoko]] || [[word:jashadngeshoko|jashadngeshoko]] || [[word:shashadngeshoko|shashadngeshoko]] || [[word:kashadngeshoko|kashadngeshoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
